flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Great Lakes Christian College are 43% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($31.1k vs $54.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Great Lakes Christian College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (60.5% → 48.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Great Lakes Christian College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.2k → $19.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Great Lakes Christian College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.2k → $19.5k).
